presentingComplaint: Fever, malaise and sore throat, day 10 post-chemotherapy
stickyNote:
Day 10 post CHEMO (docetaxel) — the 'flu-like/?viral' label is the trap. Think NEUTROPENIC SEPSIS.
Read the FBC: neutrophils? The antibiotic clock started at TRIAGE — door-to-needle target 1h.
Paracetamol given at triage can MASK the fever — don't be reassured by a normal temp.
PENICILLIN allergy = ANAPHYLAXIS. The neutropenic pathway defaults to pip/taz — safe alternative?
Cultures before abx, but DON'T delay abx. Isolate, escalate, phone acute oncology.
